nodes.label: iPhone 15 Pro Black Titanium Device Frame
nodes.source_file: Maya/Assets.xcassets/iphone frames/iPhone 15 Pro - Black Titanium.imageset/iPhone 15 Pro - Black Titanium.png
nodes.description: Transparent-screen device frame PNG for iPhone 15 Pro in Black Titanium finish. The screen area is fully transparent. Features a dark metallic bezel with black titanium coloring, Dynamic Island cutout at the top, and the same overall form factor as other iPhone 15 Pro color variants.

nodes.label: iPhone 15 Pro Black Titanium device frame
nodes.source_file: Maya/Assets.xcassets/iphone frames/iPhone 15 Pro - Black Titanium.imageset/iPhone 15 Pro - Black Titanium.png
nodes.description: iPhone 15 Pro device frame in Black Titanium color. PNG with a transparent screen cutout. The bezel has a dark/black titanium finish. Used in the Maya app for wrapping screen recordings with a black iPhone 15 Pro bezel overlay.
